uplink.description: Battery + temperature + humidity + CO2 (nominal indoor reading)
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds payload; expected values produced by running reference/upstream-codec.js as the oracle and mapping its fields to the normalized vocabulary (battery%->batteryPercent, temperature->air.temperature, humidity->air.relativeHumidity, co2->air.co2). Covers climate (air.temperature, air.relativeHumidity) and air-quality (air.co2) required keys.

uplink.description: Negative temperature + high humidity + CO2 + pressure
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds payload exercising two's-complement negative temperature (0xFFCE) and the optional pressure channel (0x09/0x73, 0.1 hPa). Expected values produced via the reference/upstream-codec.js oracle and mapped to the normalized vocabulary.
Synthetic negative case: no Milesight channel/type pair matches, so decode reports an error rather than emitting a bare object.
Synthetic negative case: zero-length payload is rejected up front.
